meta.schema_ref: plugin:UnrealAiEditor/Resources/UnrealAiToolCatalog.json (single embedded catalog, no separate schema file)

tools.summary: Destroy an actor in the editor world.
Find actors by label or tag.
Spawn an actor in the editor world.

tools.ban_reason: Only user-configured LLM endpoints per PRD.
Security: no arbitrary process spawn in default product.

tools.summary: Read asset metadata and dependencies summary.
Import files via automated import pipeline.
Open an asset in its native editor.
Rename/move asset and optionally fix references.
Compile a Blueprint and return diagnostics.
Export bounded summary of a Blueprint graph.
Open Blueprint editor focused on a graph.
Navigate Content Browser to a folder.
Focus Content Browser on an asset or folder.
Replace editor selection with specified actors.
Read recent Message Log / log tail.
tools.ue_entry_points: FMessageLogModule or FFileHelper on project log

tools.summary: Bring a registered dock tab to front.
Set vector parameter on material instance.
Execute a pre-registered editor command ID.
Move actors to an outliner folder.
Read text file under project (allow-listed paths).

Fuzzy grep project text files under Source/, Config/, and Plugins/*/Source/ (Cursor-style): typo-tolerant; ranks paths and filenames even when the user misspells or only partially remembers a name. Returns path_matches plus optional line_matches inside files. For Content assets under /Game, use asset_index_fuzzy_search (Asset Registry index).

query.description: Approximate text; may be misspelled. Matched against relative paths, filenames, and (optionally) lines.

glob.description: Semicolon-separated extension globs, e.g. *.cpp;*.h;*.hpp;*.cs. Defaults to common C++ and config extensions.

max_hits.description: Max path_matches returned (line_matches budget scales with this).

max_files_to_scan.description: Cap files opened for line-level fuzzy matching (highest path scores first).

include_line_matches.description: If true, scan text inside top-ranked files for fuzzy line hits.

tools.summary: Fuzzy-search actors in the current editor level (like Cursor quick-search): matches actor labels, actor names, class names, object paths, and actor tags even when the query is approximate or slightly wrong. Use to find walls, lights, meshes, etc. without exact names.

query.description: Approximate text; may be misspelled. Compared against actor label, name, class, path, and tags.

max_results.description: Max actors returned (sorted by fuzzy score, best first).

include_hidden.description: If true, include actors hidden in the editor.

tools.summary: Fuzzy-search the Unreal Asset Registry index (engine-maintained indexed view of content packages). Uses the same asset data the Content Browser uses; supply path_prefix (e.g. /Game or /Game/Textures) to scope. Ranks asset names, object paths, and class paths even when spelling is approximate. Prefer this over source_search_symbol for textures, materials, meshes, and other UAssets.

query.description: Approximate text; may be misspelled. Compared against asset name, object path, and class path.

path_prefix.description: Package path prefix to scope the registry query, e.g. /Game or /Game/MyFolder. Defaults to /Game.

max_results.description: Max assets returned after ranking by fuzzy score.

max_assets_to_scan.description: Safety cap on assets pulled from the registry before filtering (large projects).

class_name_substring.description: Optional filter: asset class path must contain this substring (e.g. Texture2D).

tools.summary: Spawn child agent with isolated tool pack.
Append line to tool audit log file.
Dolly or zoom the editor view.
Read active level editor camera transform and FOV.
Orbit the active level editor camera around a pivot.
Pilot a CameraActor or exit pilot mode.
Set editor camera location and rotation.
Schedule viewport capture after N frames.
Capture active editor viewport to PNG on disk.
Frame actors by path using bounds and FOV fit.
Frame current selection in the viewport.
tools.ue_entry_points: Editor Focus Selected / viewport framing commands

tools.summary: Switch editor viewport rendering mode (Lit, Wireframe, ...).
Emit and persist a structured todo plan (unreal_ai.todo_plan).
